title: BatPan Mod
description: ever wanted to server justice on a cast iron pan? no? how about an austrailium one? well with this mod, you can! (yes, the austrailium from TF2)
body: now that your ready to fry the crime out of your world, how do you get started? well fist you craft the BatPan using 4 iron blocks, and 1 netherite block. then you'll want to find austrailium, a rare material mainly found in the new dangerous Biome: Austrailia. then you can upgrade your pan in a smithing table to the Golden BatPan, the most powerful weapon in the universe.
